## Heads-up — external pull requests are not being merged during Beta

Thank you for your interest in contributing to UnitAutogen.

During the Beta phase, **external code pull requests are not being accepted**
and will not be merged. This is a deliberate decision: while the project is
young, authorship and copyright are being kept deliberately simple — a single
author holding clear title to the whole work. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
for the full reasoning and what *is* welcome (bug reports, feature requests,
discussion).

If you've found a bug or have a fix in mind, please **open an Issue describing
the problem** instead of sending a PR. The author will implement the change.

This policy will change in a future release, at which point a Contributor
License Agreement (CLA) will be introduced and this template will be updated.

Thanks for understanding.
